observed_survival.description: Observed survival data of 40 kidney cancer patients treated by the oncologist; 16 out of 40 cases survived at least 5 years. Used to compute the observed proportion p̂ = 16/40 = 0.4.

historical_survival_proportion.description: Historical expected proportion of kidney cancer cases surviving at least 5 years (one in five), serving as the reference benchmark (p₀) in the z test calculation.
